name: Teddy Bears Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and butter; beat until light and fluffy.
Add vanilla extract and eggs; blend well.
2. Sift flour into a measuring cup; level off. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, and baking soda; mix well. Add to the brown sugar mixture; blend well. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate for 1 hour for easier handling.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). For each bear cookie, form two small balls (about 1/2 inch) and one large ball (about 1 1/2 inches). Place the large ball on an ungreased baking sheet; place the smaller piece on top to form ears. Flatten dough slightly; crimp edges with a fork. Repeat with remaining dough, spacing large cookies about 3 inches apart on the sheets.
4. Bake for 7 to 10 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes before removing from sheets. Cool completely (about 10 more minutes) before decorating.
5. To decorate, use a small round tip to pipe icing onto each cookie for eyes and mouth. Use a small amount of icing to secure an M&M on the nose. Let icing set before storing in a lightly covered container.
2 dozen large cookies.
